lines.gurmukhi: ਤੁਧੁ ਥਾਪੇ ਚਾਰੇ ਜੁਗ ਤੂ ਕਰਤਾ ਸਗਲ ਧਰਣ ॥
lines.translit: tudh thaape chaare jug too karataa sagal dharan |
lines.english: You established the four ages; You are the Creator of all worlds.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੁਧੁ ਆਵਣ ਜਾਣਾ ਕੀਆ ਤੁਧੁ ਲੇਪੁ ਨ ਲਗੈ ਤ੍ਰਿਣ ॥
lines.translit: tudh aavan jaanaa keea tudh lep na lagai trin |
lines.english: You created the comings and goings of reincarnation; not even a particle of filth sticks to You.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਸੁ ਹੋਵਹਿ ਆਪਿ ਦਇਆਲੁ ਤਿਸੁ ਲਾਵਹਿ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਚਰਣ ॥
lines.translit: jis hoveh aap deaal tis laaveh satigur charan |
lines.english: As you are merciful, You attach us to the Feet of the True Guru.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੂ ਹੋਰਤੁ ਉਪਾਇ ਨ ਲਭਹੀ ਅਬਿਨਾਸੀ ਸ੍ਰਿਸਟਿ ਕਰਣ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: too horat upaae na labhahee abinaasee srisatt karan |2|
lines.english: You cannot be found by any other efforts; You are the eternal, imperishable Creator of the Universe. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੇ ਤੂ ਵਤਹਿ ਅੰਙਣੇ ਹਭ ਧਰਤਿ ਸੁਹਾਵੀ ਹੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: je too vateh angane habh dharat suhaavee hoe |
lines.english: If You come into my courtyard, all the earth becomes beautiful.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਿਕਸੁ ਕੰਤੈ ਬਾਹਰੀ ਮੈਡੀ ਵਾਤ ਨ ਪੁਛੈ ਕੋਇ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: hikas kantai baaharee maiddee vaat na puchhai koe |1|
lines.english: Other than the One Lord, my Husband, no one else cares for me. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਡਖਣੇ ਮਃ ੫ ॥
lines.translit: ddakhane mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Dakhanay, Fifth Mehl:

lines.translit: mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਹੀ ਨ ਵੰਞੈ ਬਿਰਥੜਾ ਜੋ ਘਰਿ ਆਵੈ ਚਲਿ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: pahee na vanyai biratharraa jo ghar aavai chal |2|
lines.english: Then no traveller who comes to my home shall leave empty-handed. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਭੇ ਟੋਲ ਸੁਹਾਵਣੇ ਸਹੁ ਬੈਠਾ ਅੰਙਣੁ ਮਲਿ ॥
lines.translit: habhe ttol suhaavane sahu baitthaa angan mal |
lines.english: All my adornments become beautiful, when You, O Lord, sit in my courtyard and make it Yours.

lines.translit: mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਇਤੀ ਮੰਝਿ ਨ ਸਮਾਵਈ ਜੇ ਗਲਿ ਪਹਿਰਾ ਹਾਰੁ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: eitee manjh na samaavee je gal pahiraa haar |3|
lines.english: But even this is not pleasing to me, to wear a garland around my neck. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੇਜ ਵਿਛਾਈ ਕੰਤ ਕੂ ਕੀਆ ਹਭੁ ਸੀਗਾਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: sej vichhaaee kant koo keea habh seegaar |
lines.english: I have spread out my bed for You, O my Husband Lord, and applied all my decorations.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੂ ਹੁਕਮੀ ਸਾਜਹਿ ਸ੍ਰਿਸਟਿ ਸਾਜਿ ਸਮਾਵਹੀ ॥
lines.translit: too hukamee saajeh srisatt saaj samaavahee |
lines.english: By the Hukam of Your Command, You formed the Universe; forming it, You merge into it.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਉੜੀ ॥
lines.translit: paurree |
lines.english: Pauree:

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੂ ਪਾਰਬ੍ਰਹਮੁ ਪਰਮੇਸਰੁ ਜੋਨਿ ਨ ਆਵਹੀ ॥
lines.translit: too paarabraham paramesar jon na aavahee |
lines.english: O Supreme Lord God, O Transcendent Lord, You do not take birth.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੂ ਸਭ ਮਹਿ ਵਰਤਹਿ ਆਪਿ ਕੁਦਰਤਿ ਦੇਖਾਵਹੀ ॥
lines.translit: too sabh meh varateh aap kudarat dekhaavahee |
lines.english: You are pervading and permeating all; You Yourself reveal Your creative potency.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੇਰਾ ਰੂਪੁ ਨ ਜਾਈ ਲਖਿਆ ਕਿਉ ਤੁਝਹਿ ਧਿਆਵਹੀ ॥
lines.translit: teraa roop na jaaee lakhiaa kiau tujheh dhiaavahee |
lines.english: Your Form cannot be known; how can one meditate on You?

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੇਰੀ ਭਗਤਿ ਭਰੇ ਭੰਡਾਰ ਤੋਟਿ ਨ ਆਵਹੀ ॥
lines.translit: teree bhagat bhare bhanddaar tott na aavahee |
lines.english: Your treasures of devotional worship are overflowing; they never decrease.

lines.gurmukhi: ਏਹਿ ਰਤਨ ਜਵੇਹਰ ਲਾਲ ਕੀਮ ਨ ਪਾਵਹੀ ॥
lines.translit: ehi ratan javehar laal keem na paavahee |
lines.english: These gems, jewels and diamonds - their value cannot be estimated.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਸੁ ਹੋਵਹਿ ਆਪਿ ਦਇਆਲੁ ਤਿਸੁ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਸੇਵਾ ਲਾਵਹੀ ॥
lines.translit: jis hoveh aap deaal tis satigur sevaa laavahee |
lines.english: As You Yourself become merciful, Lord, You link us to the service of the True Guru.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਿਸੁ ਕਦੇ ਨ ਆਵੈ ਤੋਟਿ ਜੋ ਹਰਿ ਗੁਣ ਗਾਵਹੀ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: tis kade na aavai tott jo har gun gaavahee |3|
lines.english: One who sings the Glorious Praises of the Lord, never suffers any deficiency. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਭੇ ਡੁਖ ਉਲਾਹਿਅਮੁ ਨਾਨਕ ਨਦਰਿ ਨਿਹਾਲਿ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: habhe ddukh ulaahiam naanak nadar nihaal |1|
lines.english: All pains are relieved, O Nanak, when He bestows His Glance of Grace. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਡਖਣੇ ਮਃ ੫ ॥
lines.translit: ddakhane mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Dakhanay, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਾ ਮੂ ਪਸੀ ਹਠ ਮੈ ਪਿਰੀ ਮਹਿਜੈ ਨਾਲਿ ॥
lines.translit: jaa moo pasee hatth mai piree mahijai naal |
lines.english: When I look within my being, I find that my Beloved is with me.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਿਰੀਏ ਤੂ ਜਾਣੁ ਮਹਿਜਾ ਸਾਉ ਜੋਈ ਸਾਈ ਮੁਹੁ ਖੜਾ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: piree too jaan mahijaa saau joee saaee muhu kharraa |2|
lines.english: O my Beloved, only You know my objective; I stand, waiting to see the Lord's face. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਬੈਠਾ ਭਖੇ ਵਾਉ ਲੰਮੇ ਸੇਵਹਿ ਦਰੁ ਖੜਾ ॥
lines.translit: naanak baitthaa bhakhe vaau lame seveh dar kharraa |
lines.english: Nanak sits, waiting for news of the Lord, and stands at the Lord's Door; serving Him for so long.

lines.translit: mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Fifth Mehl:

lines.translit: mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਿਆ ਗਾਲਾਇਓ ਭੂਛ ਪਰ ਵੇਲਿ ਨ ਜੋਹੇ ਕੰਤ ਤੂ ॥
lines.translit: kiaa gaalaaeo bhoochh par vel na johe kant too |
lines.english: What should I say to you, you fool? Don't look at the vines of others - be a true husband.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਫੁਲਾ ਸੰਦੀ ਵਾੜਿ ਖਿੜਿਆ ਹਭੁ ਸੰਸਾਰੁ ਜਿਉ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: naanak fulaa sandee vaarr khirriaa habh sansaar jiau |3|
lines.english: O Nanak, the entire world is blooming, like a garden of flowers. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੂ ਆਪੇ ਠਾਕੁਰੁ ਸੇਵਕੋ ਆਪੇ ਪੂਜੰਤਾ ॥
lines.translit: too aape tthaakur sevako aape poojantaa |
lines.english: You Yourself are the Lord and Master, and the servant; You worship and adore Yourself.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਉੜੀ ॥
lines.translit: paurree |
lines.english: Pauree:

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੁਘੜੁ ਸੁਜਾਣੁ ਸਰੂਪੁ ਤੂ ਸਭ ਮਹਿ ਵਰਤੰਤਾ ॥
lines.translit: sugharr sujaan saroop too sabh meh varatantaa |
lines.english: You are Wise, all-knowing and beautiful; You are pervading and permeating all.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਤੀ ਸਤੀ ਪ੍ਰਭੁ ਨਿਰਮਲਾ ਮੇਰੇ ਹਰਿ ਭਗਵੰਤਾ ॥
lines.translit: jatee satee prabh niramalaa mere har bhagavantaa |
lines.english: The Immaculate Lord, my Lord God, is celibate and True.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਭੁ ਬ੍ਰਹਮ ਪਸਾਰੁ ਪਸਾਰਿਓ ਆਪੇ ਖੇਲੰਤਾ ॥
lines.translit: sabh braham pasaar pasaario aape khelantaa |
lines.english: God spreads out the expanse of the entire universe, and He Himself plays in it.

lines.gurmukhi: ਦਾਨਾ ਬੀਨਾ ਆਪਿ ਤੂ ਆਪੇ ਸਤਵੰਤਾ ॥
lines.translit: daanaa beenaa aap too aape satavantaa |
lines.english: You are all-wise and all-seeing; You Yourself are true and pure.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਿਸੁ ਬਾਹੁੜਿ ਗਰਭਿ ਨ ਪਾਵਹੀ ਜਿਸੁ ਦੇਵਹਿ ਗੁਰ ਮੰਤਾ ॥
lines.translit: tis baahurr garabh na paavahee jis deveh gur mantaa |
lines.english: One who is blessed with the Guru's Teachings, is not consigned to the womb of reincarnation, ever again.

lines.gurmukhi: ਇਹੁ ਆਵਾ ਗਵਣੁ ਰਚਾਇਓ ਕਰਿ ਚੋਜ ਦੇਖੰਤਾ ॥
lines.translit: eihu aavaa gavan rachaaeo kar choj dekhantaa |
lines.english: He created this coming and going of reincarnation; creating the wondrous play, He gazes upon it.

lines.gurmukhi: ਡਖਣੇ ਮਃ ੫ ॥
lines.translit: ddakhane mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Dakhanay, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਉ ਆਪਿ ਚਲਾਵਹਿ ਤਿਉ ਚਲਦੇ ਕਿਛੁ ਵਸਿ ਨ ਜੰਤਾ ॥੪॥
lines.translit: jiau aap chalaaveh tiau chalade kichh vas na jantaa |4|
lines.english: All walk as He makes them walk; nothing is under the control of the created beings. ||4||

lines.gurmukhi: ਕੁਰੀਏ ਕੁਰੀਏ ਵੈਦਿਆ ਤਲਿ ਗਾੜਾ ਮਹਰੇਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: kuree kuree vaidiaa tal gaarraa maharer |
lines.english: You are walking along the river-bank, but the land is giving way beneath you.

lines.gurmukhi: ਵੇਖੇ ਛਿਟੜਿ ਥੀਵਦੋ ਜਾਮਿ ਖਿਸੰਦੋ ਪੇਰੁ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: vekhe chhittarr theevado jaam khisando per |1|
lines.english: Watch out! Your foot might slip, and you'll fall in and die. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਚੁ ਜਾਣੈ ਕਚੁ ਵੈਦਿਓ ਤੂ ਆਘੂ ਆਘੇ ਸਲਵੇ ॥
lines.translit: sach jaanai kach vaidio too aaghoo aaghe salave |
lines.english: You believe what is false and temporary to be true, and so you run on and on.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਆਤਸੜੀ ਮੰਝਿ ਨੈਣੂ ਬਿਆ ਢਲਿ ਪਬਣਿ ਜਿਉ ਜੁੰਮਿਓ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: naanak aatasarree manjh nainoo biaa dtal paban jiau junmio |2|
lines.english: O Nanak, like butter in the fire, it shall melt away; it shall fade away like the water-lily. ||2||

lines.translit: mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਮੁਦਤਿ ਪਈ ਚਿਰਾਣੀਆ ਫਿਰਿ ਕਡੂ ਆਵੈ ਰੁਤਿ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: mudat pee chiraaneea fir kaddoo aavai rut |3|
lines.english: Such a long time has passed. When will this opportunity come again? ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਭੋਰੇ ਭੋਰੇ ਰੂਹੜੇ ਸੇਵੇਦੇ ਆਲਕੁ ॥
lines.translit: bhore bhore rooharre sevede aalak |
lines.english: O my foolish and silly soul, why are you too lazy to serve?

lines.translit: mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Fifth Mehl:
